data.body: Delivered docs/reuse-surface.md: a developer/agent API reference for the reusable machinery — the signing surface (rebar.signing full API + manifest/HMAC/key-custody/verdict-vocab/head_sha + a worked NEW-gate example), the LLM workflow runtime (Runner protocol + every RunRequest field + run_workflow executor), the PROMPT LIBRARY (get_prompt/resolve_prompt + the closed front-matter contract + .rebar/prompts overrides + derived index + canonical-form gate + the prompt-text-vs-routing split, with the plan-review prompts as the worked example), and the output-schema seam (contracts.register_contract/response_model_for + findings.validate_structured + the schemas registry). Signatures verified against source; cross-linked from llm-framework.md + CLAUDE.md.
